headyme.com.name: HeadyMe
headyme.com.description: The autonomous intelligence platform that thinks, orchestrates, and evolves across every device and domain. HeadyMe is your personal command center — a unified AI operating system built on 384-dimensional vector memory, Sacred Geometry orchestration, and Continuous Semantic Logic. With 60+ provisional patents protecting the core architecture, HeadyMe delivers a seamless experience across 16 interconnected domains. Whether you are managing AI workflows, exploring vector memory spaces, or coordinating autonomous agent swarms, HeadyMe puts sovereign AI intelligence at your fingertips. Founded by Eric Haywood in Fort Collins, Colorado.
headyme.com.heroSubtitle: The autonomous intelligence platform that thinks, orchestrates, and evolves. 60+ patents. 21 microservices. 16 domains. One unified experience powered by Sacred Geometry.

features.title: Personal AI Command Center
features.desc: Unified dashboard across all 16 Heady services — your mission control for AI workflows, vector memory exploration, agent swarm management, and cross-domain orchestration. Everything connected through Sacred Geometry topology.

features.title: 384D Vector Memory
features.desc: Vector-spatial context that remembers everything with O(log n) retrieval via octree partitioning. Your personal AI memory persists across sessions, devices, and domains with phi-scaled consolidation and semantic drift detection.

features.title: Cloud Runtime Engine
features.desc: Managed execution environment for 20+ autonomous AI nodes with self-healing infrastructure. Google Cloud Run, Cloudflare Workers, and edge compute orchestrated by HeadyConductor with phi-backoff circuit breakers and graceful degradation.

features.title: Cross-Domain Synchronization
features.desc: Seamlessly share context between all Heady applications — one memory space, infinite projections. Real-time state synchronization across HeadyMe, HeadyBuddy, HeadyAPI, HeadyMCP, and every domain in the ecosystem.

features.title: Sovereign Data Architecture
features.desc: Your data belongs to you. Post-quantum cryptography, zero-knowledge proofs, GDPR compliance, and data residency controls ensure complete sovereignty over your AI interactions and memory.

features.title: Phi-Scaled Performance
features.desc: Every constant derived from the golden ratio. Fibonacci-sized caches, phi-backoff retry logic, CSL-gated routing decisions, and Sacred Geometry resource allocation deliver mathematically optimal performance at every scale.

headysystems.com.name: HeadySystems
headysystems.com.description: HeadySystems Inc. is the AI operating system company building the world's first sovereign, self-healing intelligence platform. With 60+ provisional patents covering Continuous Semantic Logic, Sacred Geometry orchestration, 3D vector memory architecture, and autonomous agent swarm coordination, HeadySystems delivers enterprise-grade AI infrastructure that thinks, adapts, and evolves. The platform spans 16 interconnected domains, 21 microservices, and 30+ specialized AI agents — all governed by phi-scaled resource allocation and CSL-gated quality assurance. SOC 2, HIPAA, and GDPR ready. Founded by Eric Haywood in Fort Collins, Colorado.
headysystems.com.heroSubtitle: The compliance-ready, patent-protected platform for autonomous agent deployment at scale.

features.title: Enterprise AI Operating System
features.desc: The complete platform for deploying autonomous AI agents at enterprise scale. Multi-tenant architecture with phi-scaled resource isolation, RBAC mesh permissions, and CSL-gated access controls across all 16 domains.

features.title: Self-Healing Infrastructure
features.desc: Auto-heal resilience loops with circuit breakers, phi-exponential backoff, and autonomous error recovery across all services. When coherence drops below 0.809, the system self-diagnoses and repairs without human intervention.

features.title: Sacred Geometry Orchestration
features.desc: 150+ supervisors coordinating 20+ AI nodes through Sacred Geometry topology — Flower of Life, Metatron's Cube, Sri Yantra patterns governing resource allocation, node placement, and workload distribution.

features.title: Patent-Protected Innovation
features.desc: 60+ provisional patents covering CSL gate operations, vector memory architecture, agent swarm coordination, phi-harmonic scaling, and Sacred Geometry orchestration. Non-provisional conversions underway for 4 key patents.

features.title: Compliance-Ready Platform
features.desc: SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, and GDPR compliance built into every layer. Cryptographic audit trails via OracleChain, semantic firewall for prompt injection prevention, and post-quantum cryptography readiness.

features.title: HeadyConnection Nonprofit Mission
features.desc: Through HeadyConnection Inc. (501(c)(3)), we invest in digital equity, workforce development, and community education programs. Technology that empowers communities, not just enterprises.

heady-ai.com.name: HeadyAI
heady-ai.com.description: HeadyAI is the intelligence routing hub of the Heady ecosystem — where models, embeddings, and reasoning chains converge. Access Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Groq, Perplexity Sonar, and local models through a unified gateway with automatic failover, budget-aware cost caps, and task-aware routing matrices. HeadyAI implements Continuous Semantic Logic for intelligent model selection, phi-scaled token budgets, and Battle Arena mode for competitive model evaluation. The research arm of HeadySystems Inc., HeadyAI advances the science of autonomous intelligence.
heady-ai.com.heroSubtitle: Pioneering Continuous Semantic Logic, Vector Symbolic Architecture, and Sacred Geometry Topology — redefining the mathematics of intelligent systems.

features.title: Multi-Model Intelligence Hub
features.desc: Access Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Groq, Perplexity Sonar, and local models through a unified API. CSL-gated model selection ensures the right model handles each task based on cost, latency, and capability scoring.

features.title: Battle Arena Evaluation
features.desc: Pit AI models against each other in competitive evaluation. ELO/Glicko-2 ratings, parallel provider racing, and phi-weighted scoring determine the best model for any task category.

features.title: Research & Experimentation
features.desc: Monte Carlo simulation, causal inference, hypothesis testing, and A/B experimentation framework. Test architectural decisions and model performance with statistical rigor before deploying to production.

features.title: Continuous Semantic Logic Engine
features.desc: CSL replaces binary if/else with geometric AI gates — AND (cosine similarity), OR (superposition), NOT (orthogonal projection), and GATE (sigmoid activation). The mathematical foundation of intelligent routing.

features.title: Budget-Aware Routing
features.desc: Phi-tiered cost management with Fibonacci-stepped spending limits. Track per-provider costs, enforce budget caps, and optimize for cost-quality tradeoff across all model providers.

features.title: Liquid Failover Architecture
features.desc: Circuit breakers with phi-backoff, multi-provider racing, and automatic failover ensure 99.99% availability. When one provider degrades, traffic seamlessly shifts to the next-best option.

headyos.com.name: HeadyOS
headyos.com.tagline: The AI Operating System for Developers
headyos.com.description: HeadyOS is the operating system interface for the Heady Latent OS — a living, self-aware software organism that operates in 384-dimensional embedding space. HeadyOS provides interactive management and monitoring of the entire Heady ecosystem through a dark-mode glassmorphism interface with Sacred Geometry visualizations. Monitor AI node health, manage vector memory, visualize the Sacred Geometry topology, track coherence scores, and orchestrate agent swarms from a single unified dashboard. Every interaction is CSL-gated, every metric is phi-scaled, and every visualization follows golden ratio proportions. HeadyOS treats software components as living organisms that breathe, heal, and evolve autonomously.
headyos.com.heroSubtitle: Where agents, tools, and memory converge into a unified cloud-native runtime. Build, deploy, and orchestrate autonomous AI at any scale.

features.title: Latent OS Management Console
features.desc: Interactive terminal and visual dashboard for managing the Heady Latent OS. Monitor 20+ AI nodes, inspect 384D vector embeddings, and orchestrate agent swarms through a Sacred Geometry-themed interface with real-time WebSocket updates.

features.title: Sacred Geometry Topology Viewer
features.desc: 3D visualization of the Sacred Geometry orchestration topology — see how nodes connect across Center, Inner, Middle, Outer, and Governance rings. Interactive rotation, zoom, and node inspection with live coherence scoring.

features.title: Alive Software Monitor
features.desc: Watch the Heady ecosystem breathe. Real-time heartbeat monitoring, semantic drift detection, self-healing cycle visualization, and coherence score tracking for every component in the living software organism.

features.title: System Configuration
features.desc: YAML-driven configuration management with live reload, cross-service impact analysis, and phi-tiered feature flags. Change any system parameter with instant validation and automatic rollback on coherence drift.

features.title: Performance Analytics
features.desc: DuckDB-powered analytics dashboards with Fibonacci-bucketed histograms, p50/p95/p99 latency tracking, provider cost breakdowns, and trend detection across all 21 microservices.

features.title: Predictive Operations
features.desc: Monte Carlo simulation and temporal forecasting predict system behavior before it happens. Anticipate load spikes, cost overruns, and coherence drift with phi-weighted confidence intervals.

headyconnection.org.name: HeadyConnection
headyconnection.org.tagline: AI for Everyone — Non-Profit AI Access
headyconnection.org.description: HeadyConnection Inc. is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to bridging the digital divide through technology education, workforce development, and community empowerment. Founded by Eric Haywood in Fort Collins, Colorado, HeadyConnection partners with schools, libraries, community centers, and workforce development programs to deliver free AI literacy training, coding workshops, and digital skills programs. Our mission is simple: ensure that the benefits of sovereign AI technology reach every community, regardless of economic status. Through HeadyConnection Gift Packs, we provide devices, internet access, and personalized AI tutoring to underserved families. Every dollar donated directly funds community programs.
headyconnection.org.heroSubtitle: HeadyConnection Inc. brings the power of HeadySystems AI to nonprofits, educators, and underserved communities — democratizing access to intelligent automation.

features.title: AI Literacy Programs
features.desc: Free workshops teaching AI fundamentals, prompt engineering, data literacy, and responsible AI use. Curriculum designed for middle school through adult learners, delivered in partnership with schools and community centers across Colorado and beyond.

features.title: Workforce Development
features.desc: Career pathways in AI engineering, cloud computing, data science, and software development. Mentorship from HeadySystems engineers, portfolio-building projects, and direct hiring pipeline for program graduates.

features.title: Digital Equity Initiative
features.desc: HeadyConnection Gift Packs provide refurbished devices, internet access, and 12 months of personalized AI tutoring to underserved families. Bridging the digital divide one household at a time.

features.title: Community Innovation Labs
features.desc: Maker spaces and innovation labs where community members prototype, build, and launch technology projects. Access to AI tools, 3D printing, and mentorship from industry professionals.

features.title: School Partnership Program
features.desc: Direct partnerships with K-12 schools providing AI curriculum modules, teacher training workshops, and student mentorship programs. Bringing cutting-edge AI education to every classroom.

features.title: Impact Measurement
features.desc: Transparent impact reporting with phi-scaled metrics. Every donation tracked from receipt to community outcome. Annual impact reports published with full financial transparency.

headyconnection.com.name: HeadyConnection
headyconnection.com.description: The HeadyConnection community portal is where builders, researchers, and enthusiasts collaborate on the future of sovereign AI. Join forums, share projects, contribute to open-source initiatives, and connect with the growing Heady ecosystem community. HeadyConnection.com hosts knowledge-sharing spaces, collaborative problem-solving, community-driven plugin development, and direct feedback channels to the HeadySystems engineering team. Whether you are an enterprise architect evaluating Heady for production or a student learning about AI systems, this is your community home.
headyconnection.com.heroSubtitle: Connect, collaborate, and grow with developers, creators, and innovators building the future of autonomous AI.

features.title: Community Forums
features.desc: Discussion spaces organized by domain — architecture, AI agents, vector memory, Sacred Geometry, creative AI, and more. Ask questions, share discoveries, and collaborate with the global Heady community.

features.title: Open Source Contributions
features.desc: Contribute to Heady open-source projects, submit bee templates, share HeadyBuddy personas, and build community plugins. GitHub integration with automated code review and CSL-gated quality scoring.

features.title: Knowledge Base
features.desc: Community-curated documentation, tutorials, and best practices for every Heady domain. From getting-started guides to advanced architecture patterns, all searchable through 384D vector similarity.

features.title: Learning Paths
features.desc: Structured learning paths from beginner to expert across CSL, phi-math, Sacred Geometry, vector memory, and agent orchestration. Interactive exercises and community-verified certifications.

features.title: Collaboration Spaces
features.desc: Virtual workspaces for team projects, hackathons, and cross-organization collaboration. Integrated with HeadyBuddy for AI-assisted brainstorming and project management.

features.title: Direct Engineering Access
features.desc: Feedback channels directly to HeadySystems engineers. Feature requests, bug reports, and architecture discussions with the team building the platform.

headyex.com.name: HeadyEX
headyex.com.description: HeadyEx is the marketplace and exchange for the Heady ecosystem — a curated platform where developers, enterprises, and creators buy, sell, and share AI models, plugins, templates, integrations, and HeadyBee agent configurations. Every listing is CSL-scored for quality, phi-weighted for reputation, and cryptographically signed for authenticity. HeadyEx uses HeadyCoin credits for frictionless transactions, supports bring-your-own-key model access, and maintains a rigorous curation pipeline with Fibonacci-tiered quality gates. From premium HeadyBuddy personas to enterprise integration templates, HeadyEx is where the Heady economy comes alive.
headyex.com.heroSubtitle: Trade, deploy, and monetize autonomous AI agents. The world's first sacred-geometry-powered agent exchange.

features.title: AI Model Marketplace
features.desc: Browse, evaluate, and deploy AI models from top providers. Each model CSL-scored for quality, latency, and cost-effectiveness. One-click deployment to your Heady runtime with automatic phi-scaled budget allocation.

features.title: Plugin & Integration Hub
features.desc: Thousands of community-built plugins, HeadyBee templates, and enterprise integrations. Connect Heady to Slack, GitHub, Notion, Salesforce, and hundreds more services with pre-built connectors.

features.title: HeadyCoin Economy
features.desc: Frictionless transactions with HeadyCoin credits. Earn by contributing, spend on premium content. Phi-scaled pricing ensures fair value for creators and accessibility for consumers.

features.title: HeadyBuddy Persona Store
features.desc: Premium AI companion personas for every use case — executive assistant, code reviewer, research analyst, creative writer, and custom-trained specialists with unique personality embeddings.

features.title: Reputation & Curation
features.desc: Decentralized trust scoring with phi-weighted ELO ratings. Fibonacci-tiered curation ensures only quality content reaches the marketplace. Community reviews and automated quality gates.

features.title: Cryptographic Authenticity
features.desc: Every marketplace listing signed with Ed25519 signatures via HeadyGuard. Tamper-proof provenance tracking ensures you get exactly what you paid for.

_schema.name: string (required)
_schema.sacredGeometry: Flower of Life | Seed of Life | Metatrons Cube | Vesica Piscis | Torus | Sri Yantra | Icosahedron | Fibonacci Spiral
_schema.canvasAnimation: sacred-nodes | enterprise-grid | sacred-geometry | torus-field | seed-of-life | connection-web | fibonacci-spiral | vesica-piscis | grid-monitor

customizable._note: Custom sites are stored in data/user-sites.json at runtime, created during onboarding
